channel.title: Home on Curious Electric
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Curious Electric

item.description:
Services

Consulting

Creating ideas in Innovation and Digital Transformation. Making sense of Technobabble and dent hype cycles.

Teaching

We research trends and technologies, publish our insights and educate in innovation technology.

Implementing

Purposeful Development of innovation projects and efficient cooperation with partners in subprojects.

Prototyping

We create prototypes to endeavour new technologies. We start where presentations fail, inspire and deliver useful innovation.

Team

Hans Bickhofe

SysOps and QA

Maintainer by day, maker by night. The trained electrical engineer handles huge server racks and small IoT devices and is a dab hand with the soldering iron. As a software engineer he masters client/server applications with enough Zen to dig into bugs of cutting edge technologies like AR.

Peter Bickhofe

Game Design and Art Direction

One Man Army. The Devigner startet out with graphic design and typography, then somehow forgot to stop learning. As a game designer he created numerous concepts and applications. His ideas are more in demand than ever, and since that is not enough for him, he teaches innovative topics like VR at the Cologne Games Lab.

Employment Opportunities

Unfortunately, there are no open positions at the moment.

Analytics

This web site does not use Cookies or JavaScript.

item.title: A browser-based editor for the Oberheim Matrix 1000
item.description: The Oberheim Matrix 1000 is a beloved analog synth from 1984 with a famously cryptic front panel — a handful of buttons for a hundred hidden parameters. So we gave it a proper editor that runs entirely in the browser.

item.title: Oberheim Matrix 1000 Editor
item.description: A browser-based, real-time patch editor for the classic Oberheim Matrix 1000 analog synthesizer — no installation, no backend.

item.title: Soft launch of mixxape!
item.description: mixxape soft launches! Register with the newsletter to be part of the beta program.

item.title: Successful completion of STARLIGHT
item.description: We have successfully completed the STARLIGHT project, which was supported by Film- und Medienstiftung NRW.

item.title: New courses for Godot Game Engine
item.description:
We are now offering Godot Game Engine courses for small teams, both in person and remote.

For more information and inquiries please send an email to info@curious-electric.com.

item.title: STARLIGHT receives funding
item.description:
We are grateful to receive funding for the awesome STARLIGHT project from Film- und Medienstiftung NRW!

“Mit STARLIGHT wird eine interaktive Sternenkarte mit Gamification-Anwendungen als Web-Applikation entwickelt.”

“STARLIGHT is an interactive star map with gamification applications that is being developed as a web application.”"

item.title: Next courses announced at CGL Winter 2023
item.description: From September to December 2023 more Godot and Javascript for MA1 and MA3 courses on the Cologne Game Lab.

item.title: Next Godot course at Cologne Game Lab
item.description:
In May and June 2023 more Godot 3.5.2 and 4 in a course for the Cologne Game Lab.

Schedules for Master classes:

  • MA1: 12.05.2022, 23.05.2023, tba

item.title: Lychor released on Apple App Store
item.description:
LyChor, an App to display lyrics and Chords was released on the App Store!

More information on the product page.

item.title: Filmstro V2
item.description: The Filmstro WebApp V2 is about to get ready! project page.

item.title: Game trailer first draft
item.description:
Trailer for possible upcoming game written in Godot to support the Band Radio Anywhere.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7r-r8lRbL3E

item.title: Godot tutorial published
item.description:
Tutorial on how to import Assets into the Godot game engine.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7r-r8lRbL3E

item.title: Preparation for CGL course
item.description:
In November and December 2022 we will conduct a Godot course for the Cologne Game Lab.

Schedules for Master classes:

  • MA3: 27.10.2022, 03.11.2022, 10.11.2022, 17.11.2022
  • MA1: 07.12.2022, 14.12.2022, 11.01.2023, 18.01.2023

item.title: Alvirah And Willy
item.description: Immersive Augmented Reality and browser experience.

item.title: Filmstro WebApp
item.description: The new Filmstro WebApp is online! For more ino visit the project page.

item.title: 'Alvirah and Willy' launch
item.description: Together with the famous artist Nieves de la Fuente we launched ‘Alvirah and Willy’ - more infos on the project page.

item.title: Filmstro
item.description: Create customized, royalty-free music directly in your web browser.

item.title: Gramofon
item.description: Music sampler experience with compositions by Jazz musician Jarry Singla

item.title: Stand By
item.description: Immersive browser experience.

item.title: Accretia
item.description: First Person 3D Game in Godot

item.title: Flight13
item.description: Top Down 2D Game in Godot

item.title: KMU Multiview
item.description: virtual and augmented reality (VR and AR) concepts for education and training in SMEs

item.title: F.R.A.N.K.
item.description: Award winning hardware controller and software for the demo scene.

item.title: Klangkiste
item.description: Interactive music sampler for German public-broadcasting institution Westdeutscher Rundfunk (WDR).

item.title: HoloWAA
item.description: A networked Augmented Reality game for two or more HoloLenses.
